With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use-helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 261
programme.desc: This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you're simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 280
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair-while improving scalp health in just 5 days. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 279

Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness -benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware’s No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 253
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 234
programme.desc: 14-in-1 La Gourmet pressure cooker that cooks food quickly using steam pressure La Gourmet glass air fryer cooks food by circulating hot air to produce crispy and healthier meals.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 238
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 277
programme.desc: Biowell Vital Fish Oil, contains 97% Omega-3 and adds red yeast, helping maintain the health level of the three highs. It is suitable for people who care about heart and brain health. Biowell concentrated Fish Oil, 95% concentrated fish oil. High in DHA and added with lutein. It helps improve memory, protect eyesight, and relieve dry and tired eyes.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 282
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin-your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 299
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 297
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days.

programme.title: Island Odyssey - EP 13
programme.desc: The hosts will form teams to travel to islands in Malaysia and Taiwan respectively to experience local life and see the most beautiful things from their own perspectives. They will be visiting Selangor, Tioman Island, Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Quarantine Island, Sarawak in Malaysia, and Kinmen, Matsu, Penghu Chimei and Xiaoliuqiu in Taiwan.

programme.title: The Glorious Pediatricians S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: The documentary captures the daily work of pediatricians and healthcare staff in major departments of Shenzhen Children's Hospital, including emergency pediatrics, cardiothoracic surgery, intensive care, neurosurgery, urology, orthopedics, endocrinology, and hematology oncology. It focuses on the common interactions between ordinary people and hospitals, using the life and work of pediatricians as a microcosm.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 33
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 1
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De is a popular social media influencer. Although he lives a lavish lifestyle, he actually has a lot of debts. One day, he is accidentally transported back in time to 100 years ago and meets a man who looks exactly like him.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 71
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhengmin fakes Minghua's recovery, driving Enzhu to seek Rentie's help, only to find that he has sided with Zhengmin. Faced with Rentie's betrayal, Enzhu resolves to take him down with her.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 72
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Chengzhen realises that Xianshu has no intention of separating from Xiangfan, so he decides to move out on his own. Later, Xianshu compels Chengzhen to appear by offering to buy his shop.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 20
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zaiyuan’s stepfather is arrested, and she tries to find people who know about her mother’s past.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 66
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 3
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 12
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 14
programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Call Me By Fire 3 - EP 19
programme.desc: This season upholds the panoramic competition style of its predecessors, intensifying the competitive edge. The brothers' perseverance embodies the essence of male determination and charm.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 4
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 23

programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Walau Bukan Jodoh Udah Sambungin Aja
programme.desc: Tari gets news that her boss's son is working in her office. Tari thinks her boss's son is Langit, not Gala because it's impossible for her boss to ask his son to work as an office boy. However, several incidents make Tari close to Gala because Gala is so attentive to Tari.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 9
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Cinta Kan Membawamu Ke Titik Bahagia
programme.desc: Reno, a humble pecel (traditional peanut-salad) vendor, has no idea that his new acquaintance, Tiara, is completely faking a disability just to get close to him. Tiara is executing a secret mission assigned by Reno’s wealthy estranged father to monitor and investigate his daily life. However, trapped in her own web of lies, Tiara finds herself falling head over heels for Reno-who, ironically, has also begun to lose his heart to her

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 19
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE - EP 9
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: HIKMAH - EP 10
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Kapten Nomor 35 Cinta Nomor Satu Untuk Semua
programme.desc: Thanks to the mysterious help of Zaheer (Fadi Alaydrus)-the enigmatic 'Captain 35'-Celine (Dinda Mahira), an insecure plus-sized girl, undergoes a stunning transformation into a beautiful woman. This sudden change leaves Aurel (Anya Taroreh) consumed by bitter jealousy, especially when the boy she has been crushing on completely shifts his attention to the newly transformed Celine.

programme.title: Lelepati Adalah Komunikasi Cinta Yang Hakiki
programme.desc: It tells the story of a beautiful girl named Tiara. It is said that Tiara did not study seriously while in college. This made Tiara's parents angry, so she was sent to her grandmother's village to take care of catfish. Tiara, who had to adapt to the new environment in the village, also had to respect Jaya, who often annoyed her. Even Jaya also received support from Tiara's grandmother. So why did Tiara suddenly start to like Jaya?

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 20
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 65
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Cinta Bersemi di Sarang Sindikat No. 35
programme.desc: Rangga (Elryan Carlen) lands a high-stakes project to locate a missing child in exchange for a massive 1-billion-rupiah reward. As he dives into the investigation, his path crosses with Sari (Shanice Margaretha), who turns out to be an undercover police officer. As the two team up, their close collaboration sparks intense jealousy in Gadis (Michelle Joan).

programme.title: Mahkotamu Ketinggalan di DC Cakung Queen
programme.desc: Keyla was shocked to meet Roy at the market. Roy accidentally saw Keyla, Keyla immediately ran into the market and accidentally hit Yudi in the market. The fruit that Yudi brought was all messed up. Keyla rushed to avoid Roy. Keyla wanted to find her family who had been separated for a long time.

programme.title: Job Paling The B35T Adalah Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Determined to support her family's struggling finances, Dinda tackles any odd job she can find until she finally lands her dream career as a wedding planner. However, her excitement is cut short when she is forced to partner up with Zidan-a stubborn guy with whom she had just shared a fierce, chaotic argument. Now, the bitter rivals must learn to coordinate fairytale weddings together without destroying each other.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Yang Salah
programme.desc: Kirana (Jennifer Eve) is heartbroken because her boyfriend suddenly cheated on her with her stepsister, Oliv. Meanwhile, Kirana, who sells chicken eggs, has to deal with Julian (Andrew Andika), who annoys her. However, it turns out that Julian is also the one who saves Kirana when she's in trouble.

programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: JURUS TUKANG ES KELAPA MEMETIK CINTA
programme.desc: Running away from an unwanted wedding, Wina (Larasati Nugroho) crosses paths with Jali (Randy Pangalila), a humble coconut ice vendor. The plot thickens when she realizes Jali is the son of Nyak Rodiah, the owner of the Kumbang Tanduk martial arts school-the bitter, long-time rival of her own family's school, Macan Merah

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 212
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Pinjol Hatiku, Nanti Semakin Berbunga
programme.desc: Drowning in family debt, Mita (Jennifer Eve) is pressured by her mother to find a wealthy husband to save them from financial ruin. She thinks she has hit the jackpot when she hooks the perfect rich bachelor, Dirga (Lucky Perdana). However, her dream turns into a shock when she discovers Dirga is actually the son of the very debt collector hunting her parents down.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 14
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 160
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 212
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Ya Dek Ya, Dia Pilih Pemeran Utama
programme.desc: Determined to avoid an arranged marriage with a wealthy man named Ray, Vina forces her best friend, Dila-a local durian ice vendor-to take her place. Little does Dila know, Ray had the exact same idea and sent his best friend, Kenan, to impersonate him. When the two fake identities meet, they introduce themselves with entirely different aliases, leading to a hilarious web of lies and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 14
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 160
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BABANG JEMPUTNYA SATU CINTANYA BANYAK
programme.desc: Marni (Enzy Storia) is furious when her charge switches to a new school shuttle driven by Bagyo (Dimaz Andrean). Terrified of losing her only source of income as a babysitter, Marni vows to make Bagyo pay for stealing her client. However, as she plans her revenge, she discovers that Bagyo is definitely not your average school bus driver

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 212
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Aku Gak Bisa Yura, Menghindari Ledakan Cintamu
programme.desc: After receiving life-changing help from a kind stranger, Yasmin (Ina Marika) feels deeply indebted. To repay the favor, she hires the mysterious man to be her personal driver and bodyguard, completely unaware of the adventures that await them.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 14

During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: AKSOBHNYA
programme.desc: A desperate archeologist becomes obsessed with selling a priceless ancient statue on the black market to fund her life-saving treatment for uterine cancer.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 161
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: KAMU GILA BUT I LOVE YOU
programme.desc: Popi (Larasati Nugroho) goes undercover, posing as her older sister Ninuk at a corporate office to pay for Ninuk's rising hospital bills. There, she meets Rangga (Ridho Ilahi), a corporate man 15 years her senior. The real chaos begins because Rangga has no idea that the seemingly incompetent employee he’s falling for is actually a 17-year-old minor in disguise

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 213
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lirikan Kamu Lain Bikin Pengen Log In
programme.desc: Dinda (Shanice Margaretha) lands a job interview through a friend's recommendation, only to realize her new boss is Wildan (Aditya Zoni)-the very man who had just knocked her down in a reckless roadside accident. Despite their rocky start, working closely together begins to blur the lines between professionalism and romance.

programme.title: JURUS TUKANG ES KELAPA MEMETIK CINTA
programme.desc: Running away from an unwanted wedding, Wina (Larasati Nugroho) crosses paths with Jali (Randy Pangalila), a humble coconut ice vendor. The plot thickens when she realizes Jali is the son of Nyak Rodiah, the owner of the Kumbang Tanduk martial arts school-the bitter, long-time rival of her own family's school, Macan Merah

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 213
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Pinjol Hatiku, Nanti Semakin Berbunga
programme.desc: Drowning in family debt, Mita (Jennifer Eve) is pressured by her mother to find a wealthy husband to save them from financial ruin. She thinks she has hit the jackpot when she hooks the perfect rich bachelor, Dirga (Lucky Perdana). However, her dream turns into a shock when she discovers Dirga is actually the son of the very debt collector hunting her parents down.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 15
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: CINTAKU NYASAR KE PANTI ASUHAN
programme.desc: Niken (Gesya Shandy) courageously steps in to save Dion (Rizky Alatas) from an angry mob, only to discover that Dion is a ruthless developer planning to demolish the orphanage she protects. Later, when Dion gets into a severe accident, Niken saves his life once again. To repay his immense debt of gratitude, Dion is forced to live and work at the orphanage for a whole month.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 214
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cincin Keberuntungan Bikin Lost Interest Jadi Love Interest
programme.desc: After enduring a seemingly endless streak of bad luck and disasters, Maira's (Rachquel Nesia) life takes a sudden, miraculous turn for the better the exact moment she crosses paths with a charming man named Faiz (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 16

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 41
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 10
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 19
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 13
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 8
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 11
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 3
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 9
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 6
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 3
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Elak - Elak.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 7
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 1

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 1

programme.title: Rashmi Rocket
programme.desc: Rashmi, a small-town girl, overcomes societal barriers and goes on to become a national-level athlete. However, her career hits rock bottom when she is forced to undergo a gender test. Release Year: 2021 Director: Akarsh Khurana Awards: 2022 Winner Special Award- Scene Stealing Performance of the Year- Taapsee Pannu

programme.title: Poorna: Courage Has No Limit
programme.desc: Young tribal girl Poorna joins a daring Everest mission. Fighting poverty and fear, she becomes the youngest to reach the summit, inspiring millions with her courage. Release Year: 2017 Director: Rahul Bose

programme.title: Rangrezz
programme.desc: Three friends reunite to help a lover elope, but when the couple separates, they return to teach them a lesson about loyalty and friendship. Release Year: 2013 Director: Priyadarshan

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: While searching for his missing brother, Akshay joins gangster Maya's gang, proving his strength and loyalty by fighting her ruthless rival in a high-stakes wrestling match to survive. Release Year: 1996 Director: Umesh Mehra

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds. Release Year: 2022 Director: Vishal Furia

programme.title: Jeena Sirf Merre Liye
programme.desc: Childhood friends Pooja and Karan separate when she moves cities. Years later, they reunite unknowingly, missing each other while searching for the same lost bond again. Release Year: 2002 Director: Talat Jani

programme.title: Haseena Parkar
programme.desc: The life of Haseena Parkar, sister of India's most wanted fugitive, Dawood Ibrahim, who allegedly headed his crime syndicate in Mumbai. Release Year: 2017 Director: Apoorva Lakhia

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Vikramaditya Bhonsle, a powerful politician, falls for rising actress Adaa Randhawa. Love slowly turns obsessive, forcing Adaa to make a brave, life-altering decision to survive and reclaim freedom. Release Year: 2025 Director: Milap Zaveri

programme.title: Bhoot Returns
programme.desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a grand bungalow with their kids, but terrifying events reveal a dark presence, pushing the family to fight to survive. Release Year: 2012 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.desc: Rhea, the prime minister's daughter, escapes her restricted life and falls in love with Aryan abroad, choosing freedom and romance over power. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sameer Sippy

programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.title: La Bouteille

programme.title: Pie Dan Lo
programme.desc: On 25 July 2020, the bulk carrier MV Wakashio ran aground on the reef off the east coast of Mauritius. Twelve days later, the oil spilled, causing the worst environmental disaster ever to hit the region.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 1
programme.desc: Henri and Myrlande, Quebeckers of Haitian origin and parents of three children, see themselves offered new career prospect. But will they be brave enough to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 2

programme.desc: The Memorial Tournament is a PGA Tour golf tournament founded in 1976 by Jack Nicklaus. It is played on a Nicklaus-designed course at Muirfield Village Golf Club in Dublin, Ohio, a suburb north of Columbus. One of the features of the tournament is a yearly induction ceremony honoring past golfers. A plaque for each honoree is installed near the clubhouse at Muirfield. It is one of only five tournaments given "invitational" status by the PGA Tour.

programme.title: DP World Tour 2026 (Live)
programme.desc: The Dutch Open is an annual golf tournament played in the Netherlands, and has been part of the European Tour's schedule since the Tour was inaugurated in 1972. Founded in 1912, the tournament began as the Dutch Open, before a variety of sponsors resulted in numerous name changes over the years. It is widely recognised as one of the best tournaments on the DP World Tour and is renowned for its relaxed atmosphere, as well as its activities for all ages.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 38
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 38
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 18 AUG
programme.desc: Review bursts into life with Matchweek 1 of the 2025/26 Premier League with a blockbuster Sunday showdown as Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford. Chelsea face an immediate test against Crystal Palace, Wolves welcome Manchester City to Molinuex, and Liverpool kick-off their title defence against Bournemouth.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Yannick Bahati vs. Dricus du Plessis
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a dramatic middleweight title fight between Yannick Bahati and Dricus du Plessis that ends in a tapout by guillotine, while Ricky Misholas takes on Nico Yamdjie in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: WCCB Sara Bailey vs. Evelin Bermudez
programme.desc: LIVE September 21st from the Hard Rock Casino in Ottawa, Canada, undefeated WBA Light Flyweight World Champion Sara Bailey of Ontario and IBF/WBO Light Flyweight World Champion Evelin Bermudez of Argentina meet to unify the titles. Bailey claimed her title in just her fourth professional fight defeating Guadalupe Bautista, and Bermudez became a two-time champion when beating Tania Enriquez before two successful defenses.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Paul Williams vs. Verno Phillips
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Junior Middleweights Paul "The Punisher" Williams (35-1, 26 KOs) and Verno Phillips (42-10, 21 KOs) as they battle for the vacant WBO Interim Belt at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California, USA, on November 29, 2008.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania where the top 30 competitors from the Pittsburgh Qualifier tackle the Pittsburgh Finals course.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: Wide World of Fights Akifumi Shimoda vs. Rico Ramos
programme.desc: This episode features a title bout between and Rico Ramos and WBA super bantamweight champion Akifumi Shimoda that ends with a highlight-reel KO, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Marco Antonio Barrera vs. Agapito Sanchez
programme.desc: With the WBO Super Bantamweight World Championship on the line, titleholder Marco Antonio Barrera of Mexico takes on Dominican challenger Agapito Sanchez in front of a hot crowd at the Civic Center in South Padre Island, Texas. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 118
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po want to go outside but it's raining. Some wellies and umbrellas magically appear and the Teletubbies go outside for splashy, rainy fun.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: Dee and a friend cuddle a soft raspberry and we meet the one and only Princess Raspberry! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: Mayor Oki and Geoffrey get competitive. They each want their fizzy water to be OKIDO's one and only favourite. Messy tries to help them both get to the top spot, but things get very fizzy very quickly!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: When a lost bird takes a liking to Bo, it is up to Mojo to fly it home. But it's a stormy trip, and Bo will need to do some flying of his own!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Glitch makes a sandcastle around an oasis in the Sahara. Can the Go Jetters save the day?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the temperature of the African penguin enclosure accidentally gets lowered, Jen must correct it immediately, but she can't remember what the correct temperature was. To the rescue comes Andy, who jets off in his safari-mobile, heading to Africa to discover the correct temperature that makes African penguin chicks hatch from their eggs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick. They need to head to a nearby island but they are too poorly to sail the ship. Can Duggee and the squirrels help?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 48
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge! There is so much to see, from the Carrot museum, to the Big Fruit tree. But Gerbie would rather see what real life is like and how the squirrels spend their day so the squirrels take Gerbie on a tour of the clubhouse, while Duggee tries to keep up!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic Ocean in a vintage plane.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Glitch's hopes of winning a solar-powered race across the Australian outback are foiled when he crashes the Glitchster in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 22
programme.desc: When a pair of crooks steal plans for a great new invention, there is a high-speed chase to try and get them back and allow them to prove their worth.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Unicorns, dragons, mermen, and the tooth fairy! The little animals share their favourite magical creatures.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: JoJo has a check-up at the dentist and is hoping to earn a special sticker for looking after her teeth and keeping them clean and fresh!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are paddling down Malaysia's Selangor River in canoes to look at the region's fireflies. But after a bend in the river, they encounter Glitch attempting to chop down one of the protected mangrove trees, hoping to impress Tala with the rare plant. Although they manage to stop him, the approaching dark and some thick mud leave them in a tricky situation. Can the team work out how to light their way and find their friends?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, "Just Can't Help Being Sweet!"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Apple. Singing in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 23
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and the Grape Kids are enjoying flying kites until Evil Pea arrives in her balloon and cuts them down so she can rule the supermarket skies! Supertato and Carrot must climb a display of chopsticks to retrieve the kites from the top. Evil Pea threatens to cut them down again, so Supertato and Carrot turn their kites into hang-gliders and embark on an epic aerial chase with Evil Pea, leading to her bursting her balloon on a chopsticks display sign.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 24
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend.

programme.desc: Cynthia asks Stanley to teach her to fly an aeroplane for Fifi's birthday. Stanley constructs a flight simulator and has the help of their friends to put her through her paces.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Parties, presents, and lots of cake! The animals chat about everything they love about birthdays!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: When JoJo learns that Jared was too busy to have a birthday party, Gran Gran has a Gran Gran Plan to throw Jared a surprise belated birthday party!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: While Xuli and Lars help some local divers explore the underwater ruins of Port Royal, Jamaica, Glitch sets off in search of treasure buried by his great-great-great-uncle, Captain Grimbeard. But his efforts cause silt to churn up from the seabed, trapping Lars under the water. Will Xuli manage to get him free before his air runs out?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 20
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical wish granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, "Just Can't Help Being Sweet!"

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 24
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 119
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They enjoy going on the Tubby Bouncy, the Tubby Uppy Downy, the Tubby Spinny and the Tubby Slidey.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: Green slippers, blue slippers, little slippers and big slippers. There are some surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Messy accidentally removes the brakes from Mayor Oki's carnival float, but it turns out he really needs them. Will Messy be able to stop the runaway float?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: Somebody stole the big hand off the clock tower. Mojo and Bo are on the case, but it is not as simple as it seems. Soon, they are pulling off a heist they never expected.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Glitch blocks Niagara Falls to give Grim HQ a mud bath, so the Go Jetters set out to fix the problem.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 27
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help flip him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: When a weaver ant nest arrives damaged, Andy must stick it back together - but how? He jets off in his safari-mobile to Australia, discovering how weaver ants build their nests and what they use to stick the leaves together. Will Andy succeed? And will he get back to Safari World before Mr Hammond notices the other nest was destroyed?

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!! Over the years Duggee has made lots of clothes. The Squirrels are very impressed and help to make some new clothes and present them at their fashion show. But will their Winter, Fall, Spring, Summer Duggee Collection! be a success?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick. They need to head to a nearby island but they are too poorly to sail the ship. Can Duggee and the squirrels help?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 10

programme.desc: Today, we see lots of grass - green grass, soft grass, spiky grass, growing grass and mowing grass. We see a pair of hairy grass heads, a group of groovy grasses and Dee finds some fairy grass.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: A shark on the loose in the streets of Swoppiton? Mojo and Bo are on a fishing trip to find out more! But the hungry shark might not be quite as hungry-sharky as they think.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Xuli, Lars and Glitch argue over whose vehicle is the best -€" the Vroomster, the Truckster or the Grimbler. Kyan suggests the only way to settle the argument is a race. A sudden waterspout helps Glitch take an early lead, but Ubercorn warns them about the much larger tornadic waterspouts that can sometimes appear. When the weather turns, Glitch and the Go Jetters find themselves in trouble. Can they get to safety before a huge tornado hits the island?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 21
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's your favourite show host, Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, but sings about how she's "Always Pak To You!"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 20
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical wish granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 120
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po receive a call on the Tubby Phone. It's the Tiddlytubbies who ring to say hello, just before the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 14
programme.desc: Today, we see lots of grass - green grass, soft grass, spiky grass, growing grass and mowing grass. We see a pair of hairy grass heads, a group of groovy grasses and Dee finds some fairy grass.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: A shark on the loose in the streets of Swoppiton? Mojo and Bo are on a fishing trip to find out more! But the hungry shark might not be quite as hungry-sharky as they think.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Glitch transform's Sydney's iconic Opera House into an opera boat for a race around the Australian city's harbour.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 28
programme.desc: It is Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried that the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond's animal photos from a trip to Rio de Janeiro are destroyed, Andy jets off in his safari-mobile, heading back to Brazil to take some new ones. Along the way, he takes to the skies with a burrowing owl and helps a young marmoset who's lost in the city to find his family. Will Andy get the photos he needs before Mr Hammond notices?

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 52
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true? The first problem to fix is Mole's eyesight. Happy thinks he needs glasses, but Mole explains he can't wear them for stunts as they keep falling off his nose. Luckily Duggee has his Glasses Badge, so he has an idea how they can fix them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!! Over the years Duggee has made lots of clothes. The Squirrels are very impressed and help to make some new clothes and present them at their fashion show. But will their Winter, Fall, Spring, Summer Duggee Collection! be a success?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think and they almost ruin the parade Glitch and Tala are making a huge tulip flower float for.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 118
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction.

programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.desc: Tim tries to return a lost walky talky to it's owner.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 102
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is showing Peppa and George his extensive stamp collection, which inspires them to send a postcard of their own!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 742
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 743
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting things! There is Mr. Bull's Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen and even a very special appearance from Mr. Potato, showing off his very large balloon!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 744
programme.desc: Dr. Brown Bear comes to visit the playgroup and teach all of the children what to do when there's been an accident.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 739
programme.desc: Oh, no! George has lost Mr. Dinosaur! Maybe the police can help George find him.

programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S5 - EP 505
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S2 - EP 205
programme.desc: When a mysterious ghost is causing havoc around the Lookout,The pups discover it's not a ghost at all - it's Marshall... sleepwalking! // Before the big play, a stage prop collapses and traps Cap'n Turbot. Pups to the rescue!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S5 - EP 524
programme.desc: Daring Danny X, dressed as a "Bird X" mascot for the Adventure Bay, gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 210
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 211
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 409
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 410
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 116
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 117
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 223
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 224
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.desc: Coffee's quality and popularity wane by the 1960s, until a handful of visionaries turn the industry on its head. Three college friends create an iconic brand of revolutionary gourmet coffee.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: There have been many sacred relics believed to be imbued with mystical powers. Is it possible that these ordinary items, like a tooth, or a soldier's spear, can have the ability to perform miracles?

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 35
programme.desc: Throughout the world, there are ancient structures that defy explanation. How were ancient civilisations able to build such extraordinary structures? And what purpose did they serve?

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: From a deadly discovery hiding under a national park to a Nazi-era weapon sunk off the coast of New Jersey. You never know where a killer find is hiding or who may stumble upon it.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 36
programme.desc: A cereal executive's bold idea to finance the "Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory" movie will kick-off a sweets revolution that produces some of the most iconic, imaginative confections in history.

programme.title: Alone (S11) - EP 9
programme.desc: With only four people remaining, food insecurity reaches an all-time high. One participant's prized harvest is pilfered, while another survivalist battles a debilitating sickness.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: The founding fathers of the biggest retail stores in the world battle to be the first to innovate, build, and revolutionise the industry. And Sam Walton will construct the world's largest retail empire.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 611
programme.desc: When Rick sets his sights on a musket rifle from the 1800s, can he take a shot at this deal, or is he off the mark? Meanwhile, a seller tries to flex with a signed autobiography by Arnold Schwarzenegger.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: During a high-tech laser experiment at the Triangle, the team makes a shocking discovery that may explain the strange phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 3
programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first theme park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Family-owned hardware stores become behemoth brands who battle it out, taking big risks, ushering in new innovations, and betting it all in a race to become the number one hardware store chain in America.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: From doomed voyages across continents and oceans to covert CIA operations, these missions show that no matter how much preparation and planning are done, things can still turn deadly.

programme.title: Special Forces (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: From a Tarzan assault course towering 10m above ground to a 160km forced march, recruits of Malaysian Army Special Forces unit, Grup Gerak Khas, are pushed to their limits to earn the coveted Green Beret.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: In the Bible, there are two Arks, each designed by God himself. Both the Ark of the Covenant and Noah's Ark were built to protect but lost to history. Did either exist, and if so, where could they be?

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 508
programme.desc: When a young father from Atlanta is shot dead on a Mobile street, detectives discover that his talent for computers may have gotten him in over his head.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Officer Kale Keagy encounters a suspected drunk driver who makes an unexpected demand. On the town's main drag, Officer Angel Macormic faces down a driver illegally parked in a handicap spot.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 122
programme.desc: When two beloved brothers are gunned down in their home, their devastated mother leads Gwinnett detectives to a suspect close to home.

programme.desc: Agent Dominick Polifrone poses as a mobster to stop the Iceman; Det. Carlos James goes undercover to thwart a plot against a woman's ex.

programme.desc: When Susan Woods, 30, is found beaten and drowned in her tub in America's Cowboy Capitol, suspicion falls on her estranged husband.

programme.desc: Working through many traumatic events throughout her life, Terri has done her best to overcome and persevere. The one thing that dramatically suffered in the process was her home.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 1
